creator: dwcjr@inethouston.net
text:
Makefile is missing the man page for tkrat2

Fix: 

+MAN1=          tkrat.1
+
 GNU_CONFIGURE= yes

 CONFIGURE_ARGS=        --with-tcl-config=${PREFIX}/lib/tcl8.2 \--JGGnHs7MBX5zG0WYYNYFYhqxNCF90kYCsW9mzmYIJC2U8naZ
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig       Tue Dec 19 18:11:54 2000
+++ Makefile    Tue Dec 19 18:12:37 2000
@@ -18,6 +18,8 @@
                tk82:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/tk82 \
                c-client4.7:${PORTSDIR}/mail/cclient
